name: 浏览器存储
summary: Frontend Craft skill for 浏览器存储.
description: Use when choosing, implementing, or reviewing browser storage such as localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, cookies, client persistence, offline data, secure storage, or cleanup strategy; Chinese triggers include 浏览器存储, 客户端持久化.

boundaryWorkflows: Use a security review workflow for token, private data, and XSS read risks.
Use a PWA workflow for Service Worker offline caches and installability.
Use a data-fetching workflow for server state and API cache behavior.
